archetype: 1 - Organic & Earthy (Customized for Bold Vibrant Travel)

typography.instructions: Use React Native System fonts with explicit weights. Avoid Inter for headings; use heavy weights for high-contrast impact.

hero_vacation.description: Golden hour view at ocean - Use for Travel home banner

train_food.description: Gourmet meal aesthetic - Use for Rail Food banner

airport_lounge.description: White airplane - Use for Plane Services banner

abstract_travel_map_bg.description: Bold abstract topography - Use for splash screen or auth background

nova_ai_avatar.description: Glowing AI sphere - Use for Nova AI Chat header avatar

family_safety_shield.description: Calm safety shield - Use for Family Safety Room header

buttons.primary: background: primary (#FF5A36), borderRadius: pill, paddingVertical: 16, alignItems: center, shadow: strong
buttons.secondary: background: surface (#FFFFFF), borderWidth: 1, borderColor: text_secondary, borderRadius: pill, paddingVertical: 16
buttons.action_chip: background: surface, borderRadius: md, padding: 12, flexDirection: row, shadow: subtle. Used for SAFE/DELAY/ETA/SOS.

cards.surface: background: surface, borderRadius: lg, padding: 20, shadow: subtle, overflow: hidden
cards.bento_large: background: secondary (#0A192F), borderRadius: xl, padding: 24, color: text_inverse

inputs.text: background: surface, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: rgba(92,107,137,0.2), borderRadius: md, padding: 16, fontSize: 16, color: text_primary
inputs.search: background: background, borderRadius: pill, padding: 12, paddingHorizontal: 20, fontSize: 16

Auth.layout: ImageBackground (abstract_travel_map_bg) taking full screen, with a bottom sheet (Surface) containing login forms.
components: Header text: 'TravelNest' (900 weight, huge)
Email/Password inputs
Primary Button: 'Sign In'
Google Social Login Button (Secondary style with Google icon)
Header: Greeting + Avatar
Hero Bento Card: 'Journey Health' (Dark navy background, bold primary stats)
Horizontal ScrollView: Quick Actions (Chips)
Image Card: 'Upcoming Trip' featuring hero_vacation image.
Header: Center aligned nova_ai_avatar (w: 48, h: 48, rounded-full) + 'Nova Assistant' text.
FlatList: Chat messages (User messages in Primary bubble, AI in Surface bubble).
Footer: Input field + Send icon button.

Safety.layout: ScrollView with a map or location pin header.
components: Header image: family_safety_shield
GPS Status Card: 'Last Ping: 2 mins ago' with location permission prompt.
Grid (2 columns): Quick Action chips (SAFE, DELAY, ETA, SOS - SOS in accent_danger).
List: Emergency Contacts.
Section: Rail Food with train_food image as banner, inputs for coach/seat.
Section: Plane Services with airport_lounge image, flight number input.
Section: Hotel & Partner Hub (Chips for service types, list of saved leads).
User Info Card
Section: Offline Payment Queue (List of pending FOOD/HOTL/RIDE/PASS)
Section: Open Music Pass / Saved Tracks
Logout Button (accent_danger text)

navigation.style: background: surface, borderTopWidth: 0, shadow: subtle, activeColor: primary, inactiveColor: text_secondary

testing.test_id_rule: MUST add testID property to all TouchableOpacity, TextInput, FlatList, and key Text elements to support end-to-end testing.
testing.convention: Use kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., testID='login-submit-button', testID='home-safety-chip')
